# MATLAB Functions Library

**This file is automatically generated by GenerateREADME.m. Do not edit manually.**

## Quantum Materials Analysis Pipelines

### Overview
This library provides MATLAB scripts and utilities for analyzing quantum materials experiments across multiple module pipelines and versions.

### Module Table
| Module Name | Version | File | MainLocation | Warning | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| AC HC MagLab | ver8 | `ACHC_main.m` | root |  | ACHC_main.m |
| Aging |  | `Main_Aging.m` | root |  | Aging and switching analysis with AFM/FM decomposition and current-dependent coexistence model |
| FieldSweep | ver3 | `FieldSweep_main.m` | root |  | Transport_FieldSweep_auto.m — Automatic channels (raw or filtered) |
| Fitting | ver1 | `-` | none |  | No main-like script found in Fitting ver1 |
| General | ver2 | `-` | none |  | No main-like script found in General ver2 |
| HC | ver1 | `HC_main.m` | root |  | =========================== HC_main  –  Full Version Compatible with auto mass detection in getFileListHC =========================== |
| MH | ver1 | `MH_main.m` | root |  | MH_main.m |
| MT | ver2 | `MT_main.m` | root |  | intro |
| PS | ver4 | `PS_main.m` | root |  | PS_dynamic_channels_dynamic_auto.m — Median + smoothing + outlier removal + post-normalization filtering + RAW MODE |
| Relaxation | ver3 | `main_relexation.m` | root |  | MAIN_RELAXATION — TRM/IRM Relaxation Analysis |
| reports |  | `-` | none |  | No main-like script found in reports |
| Resistivity | ver6 | `Resistivity_main.m` | root |  | Resistivity_main.m Transport (ρ/R) vs Temperature using TEX interpreter |
| Resistivity MagLab | ver1 | `ACHC_RH_main.m` | root |  | Main script for RH plotting based on slow & fast variables |
| Susceptibility | ver1 | `main_Susceptibility.m` | root |  | AC susceptibility module for Co1/3TaS2 |
| Switching | ver12 | `main\Switching_main.m` | nested |  | clear; |
| tests |  | `-` | none |  | No main-like script found in tests |
| Tools | ver1 | `-` | none |  | No main-like script found in Tools ver1 |
| zfAMR | ver11 | `main\zfAMR_main.m` | nested |  | Intro |

### Deviations / Notes
- Nested mains: Switching ver12, zfAMR ver11
- Modules with no main-like file: Fitting ver1, General ver2, Tools ver1, reports, tests
- Naming anomalies: Relaxation ver3\main_relexation.m

### Utilities
- General ver2/ contains shared analysis helpers and plotting utilities.
- Tools ver1/ contains general purpose tools used across modules.

### Usage
1. Open MATLAB and set the current folder to this repository root.
2. Run a module main script, for example:

```matlab
run(fullfile('Aging','Main_Aging.m'))
```

### Dependencies
- MATLAB base installation.
- Additional toolboxes may be required by specific modules.
